name: Mega-Knight
info: Mega Knight: This 3D-printed model shows a mega knight, from clash royal stylized warrior dressed in heavy armor. The figure features a barrel-shaped chest plate, a ridged helmet with narrow eye openings, and large gauntlets shaped like spiked fists. Painted details—such as the bright blue belt with a gold buckle and the metallic-looking skirt of armor scales—give it a more finished, hand-crafted appearance. Its wide stance and oversized gear create a powerful, cartoon-like look, making it a bold display piece or collectible for fans of fantasy-themed designs.
